retry_reason: Put operation decrements refcount; retrying would cause use-after-free or double-free.
contract_summary: This is a destructor wrapper that releases a reference on a bpf_testmod_ctx object. It is intended to be used as a callback for cleanup (e.g., for kfree_rcu or similar). After calling, the ctx pointer is invalid and must not be used. No return value; callers must ensure the reference is held before calling.
